title: Login support & feedback reply
oneLiner: Voice-guided tour for use case: Login support & feedback reply

steps.label: Landing page ready
steps.observe: Home page is open. Auto voice tour begins — no blue-tag clicks needed.

steps.label: Open Login page
steps.observe: Login support contact form for pre-login help.

steps.label: Submit login support message — manual
steps.observe: login_support context mail to platform inbox with replyTo user email.

steps.label: Student opens Feedback
steps.observe: Submit feedback thread as any role.

steps.label: Super admin replies on Feedback inbox
steps.observe: feedback_reply email and in-app alert to submitter.

steps.label: Open Feedback inbox
steps.observe: Post reply — manual step during recording.
